rule: Avoid cluttered main viewports; implement collapsible sidebars and tabbed layouts.
details: Always place primary metrics on the top left or top bar. Sidebars should collapse cleanly to icon-only layouts on smaller screens.

rule: For real-time telemetry or mapping data, use compact tables with line-height of 1.25 to 1.4.
details: Ensure headers remain sticky during vertical scrolls, and highlight active rows with subtle transition animations.

rule: Use Line/Area charts for time-series tracking (LiDAR sweeps/speed telemetry) and Pie/Donut charts ONLY for parts of a whole (status codes breakdown).
details: Limit pie chart slices to 5 or fewer. For multi-variable tracking, prefer layered area plots.

rule: Never show a blank page. Use custom skeleton loaders mimicking actual component boundaries.
details: Animate skeleton components with a subtle left-to-right pulse gradient.
